/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/dino_run.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/dino_run.dir/src/core/GameWorld.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dino_run.dir/src/core/Obstacle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dino_run.dir/src/core/TRex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dino_run.dir/src/ia/Layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dino_run.dir/src/ia/MLP.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dino_run.dir/src/ia/Neuron.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dino_run.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o dino_run  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -lpthread /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so _deps/raylib-build/raylib/external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl
